ABSOLUTE
TRACEABILITY.

Stop guessing. Know exactly where your product is, who is faking it, and how to stop them. A unified serialization and brand protection engine built for enterprise scale.

[ SYSTEM VULNERABILITIES // 02 ]

THE SUPPLY CHAIN BREAKS IN 3 WAYS.

Most manufacturers pay for all three. We fix them.
ERR_01 // BLIND SPOTS

INVISIBILITY BEYOND THE FACTORY GATE.

Once goods leave your plant, visibility drops. You make decisions on stale data while distributors control the narrative.
ERR_02 // REVENUE LEAK

COUNTERFEITS QUIETLY DRAIN MARGIN.

Fake products damage brand credibility and bleed revenue long before you detect the leakage.
ERR_03 // CHANNEL APATHY

RETAILERS HAVE NO REASON TO PUSH YOU.

Your team visits once a month, but a competitor's program runs daily. Without active loyalty engagement, they push whatever brand paid them last.
[ PRODUCT SUITE // 03 ]

ONE PLATFORM.
ZERO BLIND SPOTS.

[ MODULE // 01 ] TRACK_TRACE_V4

SERIALIZATION ENGINE

Generate unique QR codes on the plant line. Map parent cases to child items (cartons to pallets) to track unit movement from depots to regional distributors, completely offline.

FEATURES
Parent-Child Mapping // Aggregation
DEPLOYMENT
On-Prem & Cloud Edge
[ MODULE // 02 ] KAVACH_SECURE

BRAND PROTECTION

Secure high-margin inventory with overt holograms, covert clone warnings, and forensic watermarks validated in seconds via field scanner apps.

SECURITY LAYERS
Overt, Covert & Forensic AI
VALIDATION
Offline Cryptographic Decryption
[ MODULE // 03 ] LOYALTY_LEDGER

CHANNEL REWARDS

Auto-credit loyalty points and payouts directly to mechanic, retailer, or distributor digital wallets on scan verification. Incentivize authentic scans instantly.

REWARDS
Instant Digital Wallet Credit
INTEGRATION
UPI, Bank Transfer & Points
Trusted by Industry Leaders in 15+ Countries

IFFCO
CORTEVA
HPCL

adani

[ SECURITY SHIELD // 04 ]

KAVACH //
X-RAY INSPECTION

Verify product packaging integrity in real-time. Hover your cursor over the product container on the right to scan forensic security markers, simulating active hardware lens verification.

OVERT
Micro-text holographic shield visible directly on product labels.
COVERT
Offline mathematical token verification without requiring network connectivity.
FORENSIC
Machine-readable cryptographic laser prints readable under active device lens.
[ DETECTED: FORENSIC MARKER ]
SYS_HASH: 0x89F2A1

PLANT ENCODING

Laser-etching high-density 2D barcodes onto packaging at speeds of 400 cartons/minute.

[ ENGINE_STEP_02 ] STRUCTURE: PARENT_CHILD

DEPOT BUNDLING

Logical aggregation maps unit packs to shipper cases, case-to-pallet aggregation.

LEDGER SIGNATURE: AGGREGATED_PARENT_0x3B2C
[ ENGINE_STEP_03 ] TRANSIT: OFF-GRID

DISTRIBUTION

Verifying custody transfer at depots to geofence regional distribution boundaries.

LEDGER SIGNATURE: CUSTODY_TRANSFER_0x9A4F
[ ENGINE_STEP_04 ] VERIFICATION: INSTANT

SHELF AUDIT

Retail point of verification via edge scanners to validate authentic inventory before sale.

LEDGER SIGNATURE: VERIFIED_0x7C5D
[ CHANNEL REWARDS // 06 ]

INSTANT VERIFICATION.
INSTANT REWARDS.

Mechanics and retailers scan packaging on delivery. Our edge parser cryptographically validates authenticity and instantly credits payouts to digital wallets—incentivizing compliance and eliminating counterfeit infiltration.

[ COMPUTER VISION // 07 ]

AUTOMATED VISION. ZERO LABOR LEAKAGE.

Overlay AI models directly on warehouse CCTV feeds. Detect processing bottle-necks, scan pallet label configurations automatically, and flag geofencing exceptions instantly without manual scanning overhead.

FEATURE SMART EPSILON TRADITIONAL ERP

[ CLIENT VALIDATION // 10 ]

PROVEN AT SCALE.

Real outcomes from enterprise leaders.

"Smart Epsilon digitized our entire seed supply chain in 4 months. Counterfeits dropped by 94% in the first season, restoring grower trust in our premium lines."

Director of Logistics
Fortune 500 Agrochemical
94% DROP

"We were completely blind to our mechanic payout efficiency. The mechanics loyalty ledger bypassed distributors entirely, boosting authentic package scans by 85%."

VP Brand Protection
Global Lubricant Brand
+85% SCANS

"Implementing the offline cryptographic QR validation secured our high-value crop shipments instantly. Direct scanning validation bypassed distribution opacity."

Head of Brand Security
Leading Pesticide Enterprise
100% SECURE

"DSCSA compliance was a major headache for our distribution hubs. Smart Epsilon's aggregation mapping built the parent-child packaging relationships seamlessly."

Operations Director
Multi-State Pharma Aggregator
DSCSA COMPLIANT

"We eliminated supply chain blind spots entirely. We now audit regional transfers and detect leaks in real-time, boosting distribution accuracy across channels."

VP Distribution
